_meta.description: Scripture references for GFI dialogues, organized by book, reference, and dialogue. Links use articleSlug and section for new app navigation.

entries.description: God declares that creation is 'good'
The created world reflects God's rationality, beauty and coherence
Further reflection on the similarities between God's attributes and the order seen in the world
God makes humans in his image to rule over and steward creation
God gives plants to human beings for sustenance
The fall introduces chaos and evil into the world
